subject: Fw:
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Helen Kim <helen@ellmax.com>
To: elkim1234@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, March 28, 2008 1:17:54 PM
Subject: FW: 

Re:  


From: Gmax
Sent: Thu 3/27/2008 8:39 PM
To: Helen Kim
Cc: 'rkahn@nysgmail.com'
Subject: Re:


Am on it - it's a month - don't worry
Thanks
G

----- Original Message -----
From: Helen Kim
To: Gmax
Sent: Thu Mar 27 18:45:50 2008

Hey Ghislaine,

Just sent you an email from my yahoo account but occurred to me that it might get blocked by your spam filter...

In our conversation last Tues when I was terminated, you said that I'd be getting one month's severance.  I spoke with Rich today and for some reason he thinks it's 2 weeks severance.  Can you straighten this out with Rich?

Helen
